channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Atropine Sulfate Injection (0409-4910-34)
item.description: Atropine Sulfate, Injection, (Adult) 0.5 mg/5 mL (0.1 mg/mL) LifeShield® ABBOJECT® Glass Syringe (20 G x 1 1/2) (NDC 0409-4910-34)" Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-09 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug
